revision.comment: Template for adding images, see [[User:Taketa/Wikidata Images]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||
  {{#if:{{{1|}}} 
  | {{#if:{{#property:P18}}
    | {{#ifeq:{{filepath:{{{1|}}} }}|{{filepath:{{#property:P18}} }}
      | 
      | 
      }}
    | {{#if:{{#property:P41}}{{#property:P94}}{{#property:P117}}{{#property:P154}}{{#property:P242}}
      | 
      | 
      }}
    }}
  | {{#if:{{#property:P18}}
    | {{#if:{{{2|}}} 
      | 
      | [[Kategori:No local image but image on Wikidata]] 
     }}
    | 
    }}
  }}
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: ce
what's this
could you please write some documentation?
Undid revision 669312795 by [[Special:Contributions/116.86.134.233|116.86.134.233]] ([[User talk:116.86.134.233|talk]]) rv - breaks thousands of pages

Protected Template:Wikidata image: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
Disabled, way too many false positives
Undid revision 761709216 by [[Special:Contributions/Fram|Fram]] ([[User talk:Fram|talk]]) Disruptive and pointy edit
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2017 January 24#Template:Wikidata image]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
<noinclude> dispruptive notice on 400K plus articles
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template for discussion/dated|page=Wikidata image|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2017 January 24#Template:Wikidata image|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}</noinclude>{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||
  {{#if:{{{1|}}} 
  | {{#if:{{#property:P18}}
    | {{#ifeq:{{filepath:{{{1|}}} }}|{{filepath:{{#property:P18}} }}
      | 
      | 
      }}
    | {{#if:{{#property:P41}}{{#property:P94}}{{#property:P117}}{{#property:P154}}{{#property:P242}}
      | 
      | 
      }}
    }}
  | {{#if:{{#property:P18}}
    | {{#if:{{{2|}}} 
      | 
      | [[Category:No local image but image on Wikidata]] 
     }}
    | 
    }}
  }}
}}<noinclude>
{{doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: TFD closed as keep (using [[User:Evad37/XFDcloser|XFDcloser]])
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Wikidata_image]]: importing template for usage on this wiki. It is used a lot
TFD closed as keep (using [[User:Evad37/XFDcloser|XFDcloser]])
1 revision imported: I hope this actually fixes things
11 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Wikidata_image]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
TFD closed as keep (using [[User:Evad37/XFDcloser|XFDcloser]])
1 revision imported: overwriting this page since it for some reason started to get issues
Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes
revision.text:

  {{#if:{{{1|}}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
TFD closed as keep (using [[User:Evad37/XFDcloser|XFDcloser]])
1 revision imported: overwriting this template since it seems broken in how it treats unknown parameters in [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
simplify template, add qid and cat parameters
simplify template, add qid and cat parameters
1 revision imported: overwriting
simplify template, add qid and cat parameters
1 revision imported: overwriting
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{#if:{{{qid|}}}||{{NAMESPACE}}}}{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}}||{{#if:{{#property:P18|from={{{qid|}}}}}|}}}}<noinclude> {{doc}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:{{if empty|{{{cat|}}}|No local image but image on Wikidata}}]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

[[Category:{{if empty|{{{cat|}}}|No local image but image on Wikidata}}]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
